prompt: For “je / tu / il” with -er verbs like “parler”, the endings sound…
options: all the same — je parle, tu parles, il parle
explain: je parle, tu parles, il parle — the endings are silent and identical in speech.

prompt: “Je pense que c'est une bonne idée” means…
options: I think it's a good idea
I know it's a good idea
I hope it's a good idea
I said it's a good idea
explain: penser que = to think that. “Idée” transfers from English (idea).

prompt: The three ways to ask a question in French are…
explain: Tu veux ? / Est-ce que tu veux ? / Veux-tu ?
avoir = to have; j'ai = I have.
The most useful three letters in French.
